nasb.text: “Thus says the Lord God, ‘This is Jerusalem; I have set her at the center of the nations, with lands around her.

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord God: This is Jerusalem. I have set her in the center of the nations, with countries all around her.

cnv.text: 主耶和華這樣說：“這就是耶路撒冷！我曾把她安置在列國中間，萬邦環繞著她。

ccb.text: 主耶和华说：“这就是耶路撒冷！我把她安置在万邦的中央，使列国环绕着她。
